name: Ceramide NP
description: A major component of the skin's lipid barrier that helps retain moisture.
scientificSummary: One of the most common ceramides found in the skin, it is essential for maintaining the integrity of the epidermal water barrier.
mechanismOfAction: Fills the gaps between skin cells (corneocytes) to prevent water loss and protect against irritants.

seo.title: Ceramide NP - Barrier Restoration | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover how Ceramide NP strengthens your skin barrier and locks in deep hydration.
